# Partner Market Global

Canonical site: https://partner-market-global2.pages.dev

Partner Market Global is a curated B2B opportunity showcase for companies seeking qualified international importers, exporters, distributors, franchise operators, licensees, private label partners, OEM partners and country market partners.

The website is operated by Alex de Vries of De Vries Sales Consultancy to present selected client projects, products, brands and international partnership opportunities in a structured, high-trust format.

## Primary Pages

- /en/ - platform overview and featured opportunities
- /en/opportunities/ - curated business opportunity listings
- /en/opportunities/[slug]/ - individual opportunity profile with description, credentials, partner requirements, risk notes and inquiry form
- /en/list-your-opportunity/ - page for companies that want to list products, services, franchises or business opportunities
- /en/commercial-terms/ - commission-based commercial terms available on inquiry
- /en/curation-process/ - review, verification and curation process
- /en/about/ - platform story and De Vries Sales Consultancy operator context
- /en/contact/ - inquiry and contact page
- /en/privacy-policy/ - privacy, consent and data handling policy
- /en/terms/ - terms of use and disclaimer

## What The Site Offers

Partner Market Global helps businesses present international market opportunities in a clear format covering the opportunity type, sector, origin country, target markets, ideal partner profile, commercial model, territory availability, investment or working capital expectation, credentials, available documents, risk notes and next steps.

Opportunity types include import, export, distribution, master franchise, franchise, licensing, brand partnership, private label, OEM and country partner opportunities.

Current featured opportunities include Ralalifood, an Indonesian retort food manufacturer seeking international distributors and private label / OEM clients; Moja Coffee Bali, an Indonesian coffee brand seeking international distributors; and Twokyo Air, a Japanese anime apparel brand seeking international distributors and retailers.

## Important Trust And Compliance Notes

Partner Market Global curates and showcases opportunities but does not guarantee commercial success, profitability, financing, market entry approval, legal compliance or partner performance.

Partner Market Global does not provide legal, financial, investment, franchise, tax or securities advice. Companies and interested partners are responsible for their own due diligence, professional advice and market-specific compliance.

Qualified inquiries may be shared with the relevant opportunity owner when the inquirer has consented or when needed to provide the requested service.

## Entity Facts

- Site name: Partner Market Global
- Operator: Alex de Vries, De Vries Sales Consultancy
- Operator website: https://www.devriessalesconsultancy.com
- Contact email: listings@partnermarketglobal.com
